overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, food stalls, vending machines, and futuristic architecture. The camera moves steadily through narrow alleys and open intersections before descending a stairway to a lower level.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban food court with arcade machines on the left and food stalls on the right. The camera moves forward past red plastic seating and approaches a food counter with green stools, while neon signs and paper lanterns illuminate the scene.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the scene transitions to a narrow alley filled with steam rising from ground vents. The camera passes a couple embracing on the right and approaches a glowing vending machine, with a red hotel sign visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with hotel and large digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards. The camera turns right and crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a person in red while the neon-lit hotel building dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: enters commercial district with continuous storefronts and sidewalk vending machines
passes under brighter neon signs and illuminated storefront displays

large digital billboard displaying an angelic figure with wings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street lined with storefronts, the camera passes vending machines and neon signs. A person leans against a green building on the right while large digital billboards, including one featuring an angelic figure, illuminate the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker alleyway with pharmaceutical signs approaching stairs

approaches stairway entrance leading down to a lower level

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit section of the street approaching a stairway descent

segments.scene_description: The street becomes darker and narrower with fewer pedestrians visible. A green pharmaceutical sign glows on the left as the camera passes a concrete bench and approaches a stairway entrance leading down to a lower urban level.

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs into lower alleyway

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete stairway into a lower urban level with neon lighting visible below

narrow alley visible at the bottom of the stairs with neon signs and warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairway into a lower urban level, leaving the street above. Neon signs and warm lighting become visible in the alley below as the descent continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit food court through a sprawling cyberpunk district before descending into a subterranean urban level. It begins by gliding past arcade machines and food stalls under glowing paper lanterns, moving forward through red plastic seating toward a counter with green stools. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene transitions into a steam-filled narrow alley where it passes an embracing couple and a glowing vending machine before opening into a wide intersection dominated by towering digital billboards and a red hotel sign. The path then shifts along a commercial street lined with storefronts and an angelic digital display, gradually becoming darker and narrower as it passes a green pharmaceutical sign and a concrete bench. Finally, the camera turns toward a stairway entrance and descends the concrete steps, leaving the main street behind to enter a lower urban level illuminated by warm neon lights.
